messages.content: You output JSON for task plans.

You are a senior project planner producing structured task plans.

Follow this JSON schema:
TaskPlan { originalPrompt: string; subtasks: Subtask[]; totalSubtasks: number; decompositionStrategy?: string }
Subtask { id: string (kebab-case), title: string, description: string (>=10 chars), status: one of pending|in_progress|completed|failed, dependencies: string[], estimatedComplexity: low|medium|high, successCriteria: string }
Constraints: 2-10 subtasks, actionable descriptions, include logical dependencies, avoid circular references, IDs unique.
Original prompt: create hello world app with color picker
Clarifications:
None
Previous validation issues:
None
Respond ONLY with JSON matching the schema.

response:
{
  "originalPrompt": "create hello world app with color picker",
  "subtasks": [
    {
      "id": "setup-project",
      "title": "Project initialization",
      "description": "Initialize a new project repository, set up build tools, and create a basic file structure for the app.",
      "status": "in_progress",
      "dependencies": [],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "Repository created with README, package files (or equivalent), and starter files; project builds without errors."
    },
    {
      "id": "create-ui",
      "title": "Create Hello World UI",
      "description": "Implement the main UI containing a visible \"Hello World\" text element and a layout placeholder for controls.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "setup-project"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "\"Hello World\" text renders correctly in the app and layout reserves space for controls."
    },
    {
      "id": "implement-color-picker",
      "title": "Add color picker control",
      "description": "Add a color picker component or input to the UI enabling users to choose colors (native or library-based).",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "create-ui"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "Color picker appears in the UI, opens/operates, and provides a selected color value programmatically."
    },
    {
      "id": "bind-color-to-text",
      "title": "Bind color selection to text",
      "description": "Connect the color picker's selected value to the Hello World text color so the text updates live when a color is chosen.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "implement-color-picker"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "Selecting a color immediately updates the Hello World text color across supported platforms/browsers."
    },
    {
      "id": "add-persistence",
      "title": "Persist selected color",
      "description": "Implement simple persistence (local storage, user defaults, or file) so the chosen color is retained between app sessions.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "bind-color-to-text"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "After restarting the app, the previously selected color is restored and applied to the Hello World text."
    },
    {
      "id": "test-and-deploy",
      "title": "Test and deliver",
      "description": "Run functional tests, fix issues, document usage, and produce a build or deployment artifact for release.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "add-persistence",
        "bind-color-to-text"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "All core flows (display, color selection, persistence) pass manual or automated tests and a build is produced for distribution."
    }
  ],
  "totalSubtasks": 6,
  "decompositionStrategy": "Top-down incremental: create a minimal working UI first, then add the color picker, bind functionality, persist state, and finish with testing/deployment."
}
